steps.title: Identify what the blank needs
steps.content: The blank fills "Like ______ peer autonomous Soviet socialist republics." The antecedent is "the Mari Autonomous Soviet Socialist Republic" — singular. The blank needs a singular possessive pronoun, not a contraction.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'they're': contraction of "they are"; plural and not a possessive. ✗
  • Choice B — 'its': singular possessive pronoun; correctly refers to the singular Mari Republic. ✓
  • Choice C — 'their': plural possessive; does not agree with the singular antecedent. ✗
  • Choice D — 'it's': contraction of "it is"; not a possessive. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
